name: Pork Chops Vermont
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except the pork chops. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake the pork chops for 30 minutes in the preheated oven.
5. Pour the sauce over the pork chops.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, spooning the sauce over the chops every 5 minutes.
